title: mls.rs: welcome_replay_is_rejected guard (groups.contains_key check before staged join) is correct
description: join_from_welcome_for_group checks self.groups.contains_key(group_id) before constructing StagedWelcome. This prevents a replayed Welcome from overwriting existing group state. The check is in the right place (before staged construction, not just before insert). A contributor might suggest 'simplify' by removing the check and using Entry::or_insert — that would silently overwrite existing state on replay. The explicit check plus bail is the correct approach; the test welcome_replay_is_rejected verifies the invariant. Do not change to Entry API.
